error: remote: Permission to funwithscience-org/dome-model-review.git denied to Devilwench.
diagnosis: Persistent 403 (Devilwench identity). PAT has contents:write but GitHub sees 'Devilwench' as the auth identity, not the funwithscience-org owner. Universal-pusher rescue executed — 14 files copied to FUSE. Workspace-sync will rescue-push within 1h.

split_push_diagnostic.interpretation: 403 at auth level, not content-path level. Identity issue, not content issue.
